name: Button
description: Polymorphic button with size, variant, and loading states. Composes with Base UI for accessibility.

name: Badge
description: Inline label for status, categories, and metadata. Supports outline, ghost, and destructive variants.

name: Tooltip
description: Context hint that appears on hover or focus. Positioned with Base UI floating primitives.

name: Command Menu
description: Keyboard-first command palette for navigation and actions. Filterable with fuzzy search.

name: Contribution Graph
description: GitHub-style activity heatmap rendered from contribution data. Color-coded intensity levels.

name: Theme Switcher
description: Multi-theme toggle with system detection. Persists preference and transitions smoothly.
